patch.value: This task captures operational evidence for the release-readiness request. It remains open until local gates, temporary installs, history scan, commit, push, workflow release, npm registry verification, and GitHub release verification are complete.
Verify release readiness with GitHub npm pm and history checks

Run the current external and local verification matrix: GitHub issues, PRs, Actions, Dependabot alerts, repository settings, npm outdated, npm audit, package dry-run, release gate, clean temporary install, published install after release, and full reachable-history private data scan.

- gh CLI confirms repository, issue, PR, workflow, secret, and Dependabot alert state.
- npm outdated and npm audit report no actionable issues.
- npm run release:check passes.
- A clean temporary project installs the local checkout and generates a changelog.
- A clean temporary project installs the published npm package after release and generates a changelog.
- Reachable git history scan finds no confirmed private data.
- Final GitHub release and npm dist-tag are verified.

value.author: codex
value.text: Verification task opened before running final local gates and publication checks.

value.author: codex
value.text: Use only free GitHub features and do not enable paid security products.

value.author: codex
value.text: Publication evidence should include both registry state and a clean consumer install.

value.command: pm package doctor in clean temp consumer

value.author: codex
value.text: Pre-publication verification is complete; final published install evidence will be recorded after the workflow publishes v2026.05.23-7.

patch.value: Completed pre-release GitHub, npm, dependency, vulnerability, release-gate, temp-install, and history privacy checks for v2026.05.23-7.

gh repo view confirms public repo, issues enabled, projects/wiki/discussions disabled, latest release v2026.05.23-6, and admin permission; gh issue list and gh pr list returned []; gh run list shows latest Daily Release and CI successful; gh secret list shows NPM_TOKEN present; Dependabot alerts returned []; npm outdated returned {}; npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities; npm view shows latest 2026.5.23-6 before this release; npm run release:check passed; local temp install /tmp/pm-changelog-v2026-05-23-7-local-QQsBX1 activated ok=1 and generated the smoke changelog; reachable git history scan found only documented sanitizer code and synthetic token=secret fixtures; historical filename scan returned no secret-bearing filenames.
Release-readiness checks prove the package is buildable, testable, auditable, installable through pm, clean against current GitHub and npm reports, and safe for public release.

GitHub checks confirmed public repository settings, no open issues, no open pull requests, latest CI and Daily Release green, NPM_TOKEN present, and no Dependabot alerts. npm checks found no outdated packages and zero production vulnerabilities, with npm latest 2026.5.23-6 before this release. Local checks passed release:check with 18 tests, included docs in package dry run, and installed locally in /tmp/pm-changelog-v2026-05-23-7-local-QQsBX1 with extension activation ok and smoke changelog generation. History checks matched only documented sanitizer code and synthetic token secret fixtures, and filename scan found no secret-bearing filenames.
Pre-release verification passed; final publication verification will follow workflow release
